title: Automation Developer (RPA | UiPath | VB | .NET | Digital)
description:
• Position: Automation Developer (RPA | UiPath | VB | .NET | Digital)
  • Duration: 12 months
  • Location: Changi Airport
  • Eligibility: Only Singaporeans

Adopt automation and radically transform processes. We are looking for a skilled automation developer to join our Digital Finance team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing, implementing, and maintaining automation solutions which includes Robotic Process Automation and PowerApps development. Apart from having experience in low-code development, the candidate should also have a strong understanding of software development principles.

Responsibilities:

  • Collaborate with business users and stakeholders to understand TO-BE business processes and assess the impact the existing automations.
  • Develop quality RPA bots & automation solutions based on best practices, while ensuring scalability, security & maintainability. Automations must be aligned with the organization’s IT policy.
  • Prepare Solution Design Document, Code Review Checklist, and automation / app handover documentations.
  • Participate in code reviews, ensuring best practices are adopted.
  • Plan & conduct User Acceptance Testing (UAT) activities and ensure proper testing before deployment.
  • Provide maintenance support, troubleshoot errors, identify root cause, and provide timely resolution for all existing RPA and app solutions.
  • Support Business Users in subsequent enhancements / change requests as and when required.

Specific Requirements
Requirements:

  • Obtained UiPath RPA Advanced Developer Certification and/or Microsoft Power Platform Developer Associate Certification.
  • At least 2 years of hands-on experience in programming (VB, .NET), Power Platform & UiPath implementation.
  • Experience in SAP S4 HANA, AI development / working experience in automating Finance processes is a distinct advantage.
  • Proven hands-on experience in designing, developing, implementing, and maintaining application codes.
  • Comfortable with maintaining & working on codes developed by other developers.
  • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to think out-of-the-box.
  • Ability to appreciate the importance of UX sensibilities.
  • Ability to work independently and collaborate effectively with stakeholders.
  • Team player with a willingness to share knowledge and learn from others.
  • Excellent interpersonal and communication skills.
  • Ability to multitask in a dynamic and fast-paced environment, manage change, and tight deadlines.
  • Ability to adapt to changing project requirements & priorities, maintaining a high level of efficiency and work quality

------------

BGC Group is an international recruitment and manpower outsourcing firm that identifies and delivers human capital solutions that imperative to every successful company’s growth. 

Having helped 25,000 individuals quickly land rewarding careers in companies that drive industries since our inception in 2005, we believe in developing relationships based on a solid ground of trust between both employers and job-seekers. This is what differentiates us and gives us a competitive edge from the rest. 

Staying true to our vision of Bridging & Growing Careers Because We Care, we are now proudly listed under Omnibridge Holdings on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (08462:HK) in 2017.
